news.title: 新西兰前总理移居澳洲，人才外流问题再引关注
news.title0: Jacinda Ardern's move to Australia renews spotlight on New Zealand's brain drain problem
news.content: 新西兰前总理阿德恩举家迁居悉尼，引发对该国经济困境下人才持续外流，尤其是流向澳大利亚的讨论。
news.content0: For a people nicknamed after a flightless bird, taking off overseas has somewhat ironically become a rite of passage for many New Zealanders.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 印加签署核能协议，修复紧张双边关系
news.title0: India and Canada reset ties with 'landmark' nuclear energy deal
news.content: 印度与加拿大宣布达成十年期核能供应等多项协议，旨在修复因锡克教领袖遇刺事件而恶化的双边关系。
news.content0: India and Canada have announced a host of agreements, including a 10-year nuclear energy deal, after their prime ministers met in Delhi to reset ties that plummeted due to diplomatic tensions.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 法国宣布扩大核武库，威慑范围覆盖欧洲盟友
news.title0: France to boost nuclear arsenal and extend deterrence to European allies
news.content: 法国总统马克龙宣布将增加核弹头数量，并启动“高级威慑”战略，允许八个欧洲伙伴国参与其核演习。
news.content0: France is to boost its nuclear arsenal and extend the deterrent to cover other European countries, in a major development of its nuclear defence policy.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 迪拜遭袭，安全天堂形象受冲击
news.title0: 'Everything has changed': Missile attacks shatter Dubai's safe haven image
news.content: 伊朗导弹袭击迪拜豪华酒店等地，打破了该城作为动荡地区安全避风港的形象，令部分外籍人士重新考虑去留。
news.content0: When Will Bailey stepped off a plane in Dubai in the early hours of Saturday morning, it was supposed to mark a new chapter in his life.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 得州酒吧枪击案受害者身份确认，FBI调查恐袭关联
news.title0: Texas authorities identify Austin bar shooting victims
news.content: 美国得州奥斯汀酒吧枪击案致两死多伤，枪手被击毙。FBI正调查事件是否与恐怖主义存在关联。
news.content0: Authorities have identified the two people fatally shot outside a bar in Austin, Texas when a gunman opened fire in the early hours of Sunday.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 中东战事致航空大乱，多国机场关闭航班取消
news.title0: Closed airports, empty skies: What travelers impacted by Middle East air disruptions need to know
news.content: 伊朗战事导致中东多国空域关闭、机场停运，全球数千旅客行程受阻，航空业面临疫情以来最大挑战。
news.content0: Thewar in Irancontinues to cause aviation chaos in the Middle East and beyond, with planes remaining grounded in one of the world’s busiest travel regions.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 演员大奖红毯星光熠熠，众星诠释复古主题
news.title0: The most striking looks from the Actor Awards red carpet
news.content: 更名后的演员大奖首次设定“重塑1920-30年代好莱坞魅力”着装主题，众明星以流苏、珠饰等造型亮相红毯。
news.content0: The Screen Actors Guild Awards returned on Sunday evening, complete with anew name— and, for the first time ever, a thematic dress code.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 苹果推出低价iPhone 17e，起售价599美元
news.title0: Apple launches cheaper iPhone 17e in push to boost iPhone sales
news.content: 苹果发布起售价599美元的iPhone 17e，采用单摄像头、小尺寸屏幕，旨在以更亲民价格提振iPhone销量。
news.content0: Apple announced Monday a lower-priced version of the iPhone 17, expanding its smartphone lineup as it relies on its blockbuster product to stave off concerns the company is falling behind in artificial intelligence.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 巴基斯坦空袭阿富汗巴格拉姆基地，与塔利班冲突升级
news.title0: Pakistan Strikes Bagram Air Base, Escalating ‘Open War’ With Taliban
news.content: 巴基斯坦军方空袭了阿富汗境内的巴格拉姆空军基地，以摧毁塔利班资产，标志着两国间“公开战争”进一步升级。
news.content0: The Pakistani military hit Bagram Air Base on Sunday, according to satellite images obtained by The New York Times, escalating its war against Afghanistan by targeting a prized asset of the Taliban administration.
news.author: NYTimes
